common_errors_unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common_errors_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.
common_errors_UNAUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
common_errors_CONFLICT: A conflict occurred with the current state.
common_errors_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please try again later.
geo_validation_address_line1_required: Line 1 is required when address is provided.
geo_validation_address_line2_required: Line 2 is required when Line 3 is provided.
geo_validation_company_name_required: Company name is required when professional details are provided.
geo_validation_first_name_required: First name is required when personal details are provided.
geo_validation_ip_invalid: Must be a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address.
auth_errors_SIGN_IN_THROTTLED: Too many sign-in attempts. Please try again later.
auth_errors_EMULATION_CONSENT_ALREADY_EX: An active consent already exists for this organisation.
auth_errors_EMULATION_CONSENT_ALREADY_RE: This consent has already been revoked.
auth_errors_EMULATION_ORG_TYPE_NOT_ALLOW: Emulation is not allowed for this organisation type.
auth_errors_ORG_CONTACT_ORG_MISMATCH: The contact does not belong to this organisation.
auth_sign_in_description: Enter your credentials to access your account.
auth_sign_up_description: Fill in your details to get started.
webclient_forms_phone_description: Include country code for international numbers.
webclient_forms_postal_code_description: Must match the selected country format.
webclient_hero_tagline: Built for contractors and operators, not accountants. Estimates, scheduling, and invoices — simplified. Decisive Works.
auth_email_verification_body: Please verify your email by clicking the link below:
auth_email_verification_plaintext: Hi {name}, please verify your email by visiting: {url}.
auth_email_link_fallback: If the above link does not work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
auth_email_password_reset_body: You requested a password reset. Click the link below to set a new password:
auth_email_password_reset_disclaimer: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.
auth_email_password_reset_plaintext: Hi {name}, reset your password by visiting: {url}. If you didn't request this, ignore this email.
auth_email_invitation_body: You've been invited to join {orgName}. Click below to accept.
auth_email_verified_description: Your email has been verified successfully.
auth_email_failed_description: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
auth_forgot_password_description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth_forgot_password_sent_description: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.
auth_forgot_password_sent_note: Check your inbox and click the link to reset your password.
auth_reset_password_success_description: Your password has been reset successfully.
auth_reset_password_success_redirect: Redirecting to sign in in {seconds} seconds...
auth_reset_password_invalid_token_descri: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth_verify_email_description: Check your email and click the verification link to activate your account.
